title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker18: coap_status.c
close_reason: Fixed merge artifacts in coap_status.c: corrected top-level CBOR map count from 5 to 6, updated ipv6_buf from hardcoded 40 to LICHEN_CONFIG_ADDR_MAX_LEN (prevents -ENOBUFS), cleaned function indentation. Verified via git diff and build compatibility.
